title: Marketing mobile PipeShare and PipeSync entry buttons
description:
The Horizon Pipe marketing site now shows PipeShare and PipeSync on mobile: a sticky pill bar under the header plus matching buttons in the hamburger menu. Desktop header links are unchanged.

Who is affected: visitors on horizonpipe.com / pipeshare.live marketing pages on phones and small tablets.
changeLog: Mobile sticky PipeShare (green) and PipeSync (orange) pill bar under site header.
Same product buttons added inside the mobile navigation menu.
Shared hp-product-links.css/js on index, about, and services pages.
Desktop PIPE SHARE / PIPE SYNC header links preserved.
